text: It is not easy to see what the sacred author meant by ‘the Master whom I serve’; the obscure words used in Ps. 109.1 are only an incomplete parallel.
It is not clear whether we are to understand the word ‘wanderings’ literally (cf. 34.12) or metaphorically.
It seems clear that some words have dropped out at the end of this verse; the Hebrew gives ‘and the man who is intent upon her will discover her’.
